message:
fix: exempt feedback POST from apiLimiter group middleware (#10278)

Fiber v2's group prefix matching applies apiLimiter to ALL /api/* routes
including standalone routes registered before the group. This caused
feedback submission to get 429'd when dashboard polling exhausted the
general 2000 req/min budget, even though feedback has its own dedicated
feedbackLimiter (10 req/hr).

Wrap apiLimiter in apiLimiterWithSkip that skips POST /api/feedback/requests,
letting only the dedicated feedbackLimiter apply.

Fixes #9969

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
